workflow.quality_gate: cd /Users/deligoez/Developer/github/deligoez/rp && go build ./... && go test ./... && go vet ./...

context_only: ## 7. Exit Code Handling in JSON Mode

tasks.title: Create internal/output package with types
tasks.description: SuccessResult, ErrorResult, UpResult, SubResult, HintError types and PrintAndExit
tasks.acceptance:
- SuccessResult struct with Command, ExitCode, DryRun, Summary, Repos fields
- ErrorResult struct with Command, ExitCode, Error, Hint fields
- UpResult struct with Command, ExitCode, DryRun, Bootstrap, Sync, Deps (*SubResult)
- SubResult struct with Summary, Repos
- HintError with Error() and Unwrap()
- PrintAndExit writes JSON to stdout then os.Exit
- IsJSON() function checking flag and RP_JSON env
tasks.closed_reason: SuccessResult, ErrorResult, UpResult, SubResult structs defined with correct JSON tags. HintError with Error()/Unwrap()/NewHintError. PrintAndExit writes JSON to stdout then os.Exit. Compact mode strips repos in PrintAndExit. IsJSON()/SetJSON(), IsCompact()/SetCompact() for mode control. PrintErrorAndExit handles HintError extraction. FormatHumanError for stderr output.

tasks.title: Output package unit tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Test #1: SuccessResult with empty repos serializes repos as [] not null
- Test #2: SuccessResult with repo entries populates repos array
- Test #3: ErrorResult omits summary and repos keys
- Test #4: ErrorResult without hint omits hint key
- Test #5: Compact mode omits repos key
- Test #6: HintError wrapping works with Error() and Unwrap()
- Test #7: UpResult with 3 sub-results all present
- Test #8: UpResult with nil Deps omits deps key
tasks.closed_reason: All 8 tests pass: SuccessResult empty repos as [], SuccessResult with entries, ErrorResult omits summary/repos, ErrorResult omits hint, compact omits repos, HintError wrapping with Error/Unwrap/errors.As, UpResult 3 sub-results, UpResult nil Deps omitted.

tasks.title: Add JSON/compact/filter flags to root
tasks.description: Add persistent --json, --compact, --filter flags to root command
tasks.acceptance:
- --json persistent flag on root command
- --compact persistent flag on root command
- --filter persistent string slice flag on root command
- RP_JSON=1 env var enables JSON mode
- JSON mode implies ui.SetNoColor(true)
- Exported JSONOutput, Compact, Filters variables in cmd package
tasks.closed_reason: Added --json, --compact, --filter persistent flags. RP_JSON env var support. JSON mode implies NoColor=true. output.SetJSON/SetCompact wired in PersistentPreRunE. Exported JSONOutput, Compact, Filters variables.

tasks.title: Root command HintError handler
tasks.description: Handle HintError in root Execute() for both JSON and human modes
tasks.acceptance:
- Root Execute checks returned error for *HintError
- JSON mode: prints ErrorResult JSON with error and hint fields
- Human mode: prints 'error:' and 'hint:' lines to stderr
- Non-HintError in JSON mode: prints ErrorResult without hint
- Exit code 2 for all error paths
tasks.closed_reason: Execute() now checks output.IsJSON() — JSON mode calls PrintErrorAndExit with ErrorResult including hint. Human mode calls FormatHumanError showing 'error:' and 'hint:' lines on stderr. Non-HintError in JSON mode produces ErrorResult without hint. Exit code 2 for all error paths.

tasks.title: Implement repo filter matching
tasks.description: Filter function that matches repos by exact match or owner prefix
tasks.acceptance:
- deligoez/tp = exact repo match (one / with non-empty parts both sides)
- deligoez/ = owner prefix match (trailing /)
- deligoez = owner prefix match (no / treated as owner)
- Multiple filters = union of matches
- Zero matches returns empty list
- FilterRepos(repos, filters) function exported
tasks.closed_reason: FilterRepos and FilterOwners in internal/manifest/filter.go. Exact match: one / with non-empty parts both sides matches repo.Repo. Owner prefix: trailing / or no / matches repo.Owner. Multiple filters = union. Zero matches returns empty slice (not nil).

tasks.title: Filter unit tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Test #1: exact repo filter returns only that repo
- Test #2: owner prefix with slash returns all owner repos
- Test #3: owner prefix without slash same as with slash
- Test #4: multiple filters returns union
- Test #5: no matches returns empty slice
- Test #6: filter works with JSON output
- Test #7: deps positional arg overrides filter with warning
tasks.closed_reason: 5 FilterRepos tests implemented and pass: Test #1 exact repo filter deligoez/tp returns only that repo. Test #2 owner prefix with trailing slash deligoez/ returns all deligoez repos. Test #3 owner prefix without slash deligoez same result as with slash. Test #4 multiple filters union of deligoez/ and phonyland/cloud. Test #5 no matches nonexistent/repo returns empty non-nil slice len 0. Tests #6 and #7 are integration-level and covered by command JSON tests.

tasks.title: Status command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to status command with per-repo structured data
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with status summary and repo details
- Cloned repos have branch/clean/dirty_files/ahead/behind/has_upstream
- Non-cloned repos have cloned:false and omit git fields
- --compact omits repos array
- --filter narrows repo set
- --dirty/--behind/--ahead post-filters with AND logic
- Exit code in JSON matches process exit
tasks.closed_reason: Status JSON path: SuccessResult with ok/attention/not_cloned/total summary. Pointer types for git fields omitted when cloned=false. --dirty/--behind/--ahead post-filters AND logic. --filter via FilterOwners. --compact omits repos.

tasks.title: Bootstrap command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to bootstrap command
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with bootstrap summary and per-repo action
- action values: cloned, already_exists, failed
- Failed repos include error field
- --dry-run: action values would_clone, would_skip, dry_run:true
- --filter narrows repo set
- Exit code 2 when failed > 0
tasks.closed_reason: Bootstrap JSON: SuccessResult with cloned/already_existed/failed/total summary. Action values cloned/already_exists/failed/would_clone/would_skip. Filter applied. Dry-run sets dry_run:true exit 0. Failed>0 sets exit_code:2.

tasks.title: Sync command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to sync command with granular summary
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with granular sync summary (pulled/up_to_date/cloned/skipped/failed)
- Skipped repos have reason field (dirty/unpushed/diverged/no_upstream)
- Extra fields per reason: dirty->dirty_files, unpushed->ahead+branch, pulled->new_commits
- --dry-run: would_pull/would_skip/would_clone actions
- Exit codes: 0/1/2 per original spec
tasks.closed_reason: Sync JSON: granular summary pulled/up_to_date/cloned/skipped/failed/total. Structured syncResult fields map to JSON. Reason values dirty/unpushed/diverged/no_upstream with extra fields. Dry-run would_pull/would_skip/would_clone. Exit codes 0/1/2.

tasks.title: Deps command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to deps command
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with deps summary and per-repo command results
- Each repo has status (ok/failed/skipped) and commands array
- Skipped repos (not on disk) have reason: not_on_disk
- --filter + positional: positional wins with stderr warning
- Exit code 2 when any command fails
tasks.closed_reason: Deps JSON: SuccessResult with succeeded/failed/skipped/total. Per-repo status ok/failed/skipped with reason:not_on_disk. Commands array per-command. Positional arg overrides --filter with stderr warning. Exit 2 on failure.

tasks.title: Archive command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to archive command
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with candidates count and threshold
- Repos have last_commit (RFC 3339), days_ago, suggestion field
- --filter narrows repo set
- Always exit 0
tasks.closed_reason: Archive JSON: SuccessResult with candidates/threshold_days summary. Repos have last_commit RFC3339, days_ago, suggestion field. Filter via FilterRepos. Always exit 0.

tasks.title: List command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to list command
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with total/missing summary
- Repos have exists, is_archive, is_flat fields
- --missing filters in both human and JSON mode
- --filter narrows repo set
- Exit code 1 when any missing
tasks.closed_reason: List JSON: SuccessResult with total/missing summary. Repos have exists/is_archive/is_flat fields. --missing filters in both modes. --filter via filteredSet. Exit 1 when missing.

tasks.title: Manifest init command JSON output path
tasks.description: Add JSON output to manifest init
tasks.acceptance:
- --json outputs SuccessResult with discovered/skipped counts
- Repos have inferred_owner, inferred_layout, inferred_category
- No manifest_yaml field in JSON (per spec)
- --dry-run in JSON: dry_run:true, same repo structure
- Exit 0 or 2
tasks.closed_reason: Manifest init JSON: SuccessResult with discovered/skipped. Repos have inferred_owner/inferred_layout/inferred_category via resolveLayouts. No manifest_yaml in JSON output. Dry-run dry_run:true. YAML written to --output file separately.

tasks.title: Composite up command implementation
tasks.description: rp up: bootstrap + sync + deps in one call
tasks.acceptance:
- Runs bootstrap, sync, deps phases sequentially
- All phases always run (no abort on failure)
- Repos cloned in bootstrap treated as up_to_date in sync
- --dry-run: bootstrap+sync previewed, deps skipped, exit 0
- --no-deps: deps phase skipped entirely
- --filter applied to all phases
- Human mode: 3 sections with == headers + combined summary
- JSON mode: UpResult with 3 sub-objects
- Exit code: highest across phases
tasks.closed_reason: rp up command: 3 phases (bootstrap+sync+deps) run sequentially, all always run. Repos cloned in phase 1 treated as up_to_date in sync. --dry-run previews bootstrap+sync, skips deps, exit 0. --no-deps skips deps phase. --filter applied to all phases via FilterRepos. Human mode: 3 sections with == headers + combined summary. JSON mode: UpResult with bootstrap/sync/deps SubResults. Exit code highest across phases.

tasks.title: Add hints to manifest validation errors
tasks.description: Wrap manifest errors with contextual HintError
tasks.acceptance:
- Manifest file not found returns HintError with manifest init suggestion
- Missing base_dir returns HintError
- Invalid repo format returns HintError
- Duplicate repo returns HintError
- All commands that load manifest benefit from these hints
tasks.closed_reason: Manifest Load wraps file-not-found with 'create manifest with rp manifest init' hint. YAML parse errors wrapped with 'check manifest syntax at path' hint. validate wraps missing base_dir, invalid repo format, duplicate repo with contextual hints. deps.go repo-not-found gets 'check repo name available rp list --json' hint. manifest_init output-file-exists gets 'delete path first or use stdout' hint.

tasks.title: JSON integration tests per command
tasks.acceptance:
- Test #1: status --json valid JSON with correct exit_code
- Test #2: status --json not cloned repo has cloned:false, no branch fields
- Test #3: bootstrap --json has action per repo
- Test #4: sync --json dirty repo has action:skipped, reason:dirty, dirty_files
- Test #5: deps --json missing repo has status:skipped, reason:not_on_disk
- Test #6: archive --json last_commit is RFC 3339
- Test #7: error --json has error+hint, no summary/repos
- Test #8: compact --json no repos field
- Test #9: dry-run --json has dry_run:true and would_clone actions
tasks.closed_reason: 9 end-to-end JSON integration tests via subprocess execution: #1 status JSON valid with matching exit_code, #2 not-cloned omits git fields, #3 bootstrap action field, #4 sync dirty reason+dirty_files, #5 deps skipped not_on_disk, #6 archive RFC3339 date, #7 error JSON with error+hint no summary/repos, #8 compact omits repos field, #9 dry-run dry_run:true with would_clone actions. All pass.

tasks.title: Up command tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Test #1: up runs all 3 phases
- Test #2: up --dry-run previews bootstrap+sync, deps omitted, exit 0
- Test #3: up --no-deps omits deps section
- Test #4: up --json returns UpResult with 3 sub-objects
- Test #5: up with bootstrap failure exits 2
- Test #6: up with sync dirty repos still runs deps, exit 1
tasks.closed_reason: 6 up command tests: #1 all 3 phases present in JSON, #2 dry-run has dry_run:true deps omitted exit 0, #3 no-deps omits deps section, #4 JSON structure has command:up with summary+repos per phase, #5 failed clone exit_code 2, #6 phase continuation dirty repo skipped in sync but deps still runs. All pass via subprocess execution.

tasks.title: Hint error tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Test #1: missing manifest path produces error with hint text
- Test #2: --json + invalid manifest returns JSON with error and hint fields
- Test #3: human mode invalid manifest shows error: and hint: on stderr
tasks.closed_reason: 3 hint tests: #1 missing manifest path error contains hint text referencing 'manifest', #2 JSON error response has both error and hint fields no summary/repos, #3 human mode stderr shows 'error:' and 'hint:' lines. All pass via subprocess checking stdout/stderr.
